feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC scripting: Change measure based on value of a dimension input control?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a dimension input control like this:

I want to change the dimension of another chart based on the selected dimension in that dimension input control.

For example of "Hersteller" is selected there, I want the dimension of a bar chart to be "Serie". Etc.

Is that generally possible in the SAC?

entry.title: SAC Import Job for Month End
entry.content:
Business needs to run import job multiple times a day (4 times a day) for the last week in the month. 

Question:

- Is there any recommendations on how we would be able to accomplish this?

- I've read some folks suggest creating identical import jobs and schedule them staggered out in the required timeframe. This means I might have 7 import jobs scheduled. Is there any impact to performance issues either in the input forms or any other assets?

entry.title: prevent a user from deleting a zero in sap analytics cloud planning
entry.content: Hi all, how can I prevent a user from deleting a zero in sap analytics cloud planning template without data locks or locking the cell. The user should still be able to change the zero to any other value, except physically deleting the zero i.e. making it unbooked SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

entry.title: SAC Data Action - are IF statements like a select on the data and then the if block is executed?
entry.content:
Hello Planning Gurus,

I got a general question on how the data is processed in data actions. Coming from BW my thinking was that a data action loops thru the data and executes on every record the data action code sequentially (like a BW start routine would do).

However, recently code of one data action acted weired (see long text bellow) and I wonder if I was thinking wrong all the time and there is no overall loop but the code is simply executed sequentially and is resulting in selection based loops. 

So your memberset makes the first select. If you have an if statement for a particular month this is then selected from the memberset result and the if statement block is executed on that selected data (now in a loop) and written back if there is any data() command.

Next if statement is again selecting data from the memberset result (could overlapp with previous if statement) and executed...

Is this how an data action works? 

Thanks and best regards
Axel

Data Action Problem that triggered the question in regards to processing
---------------------------------------

I got a data action that is calculating the difference Q1 to Q1 previous year using variablemembers for a monthly planning model.

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = ("I_GROWTH")
MEMBERSET [d/Monat] = BASEMEMBER([d/Monat].[h/YM],%YEAR_TO_CALCULATE%  )
 
AGGREGATE_DIMENSIONS = ....
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
AGGREGATE_WRITETO .... = "#"
 
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_VARIANCE_Q1 OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_Q1 OF [d/Monat]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_VARIANCE_Q2 OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_Q2 OF [d/Monat]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_VARIANCE_Q3 OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_Q3 OF [d/Monat]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_VARIANCE_Q4 OF [d/Measures]
VARIABLEMEMBER #QTR_Q4 OF [d/Monat]
 
DELETE([d/Measures]="I_GROWTH")
 
IF [d/Monat].[p/QUARTERDESC]="Q1" THEN
   DATA([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q1,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q1)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="REV")+       (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]=%REF_VERSION_Q1Q2%,[d/Measures]="REV",[d/Monat]=PREVIOUS(12))*-1)
ENDIF
// Write growth bonus to last month of qtr
IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Mar" THEN
    IF (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q1,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q1)) >= 1000 THEN
    DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q1,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q1)*3.00
ENDIF
 
ENDIF

This is working fine. Requirement changed now that growth for Q4 should be compared only Nov and Dec (not the full qrt) so I adjusted the code to check for month

IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Nov" THEN
DATA([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="REV")+(RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]=%REF_VERSION_Q3Q4%,[d/Measures]="REV",[d/Monat]=PREVIOUS(12))*-1)
ENDIF
IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Dec" THEN
 DATA([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="REV")+ (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]=%REF_VERSION_Q3Q4%,[d/Measures]="REV",[d/Monat]=PREVIOUS(12))*-1)

 IF (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)) >= 700 THEN
 DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)*3.00
ENDIF
ENDIF
 
Problem: the if statement for November seems to be executed after Dec. Hence the QTR_VARIANCE variable holds only difference Dec to Dec and therfore the growth bonus is calculated to low. (at least that is my only explanation). The Nov statement is definitly executed I checked that by writing some data to Nov month.
 
When I changed code to 
IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Nov" OR [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Dec" THEN
DATA([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="REV")+(RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]=%REF_VERSION_Q3Q4%,[d/Measures]="PAX",[d/Monat]=PREVIOUS(12))*-1)

ENDIF
IF [d/Monat].[p/MONTHDESC]="Dec" THEN
 IF (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)) >= 700 THEN
 DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]=#QTR_VARIANCE_Q4,[d/Monat]=#QTR_Q4)*3.00
 ENDIF
ENDIF
It was working as expected.

entry.title: sharing just the bookmark and restrict accessing the original Story.
entry.content:
Hello community,

We're dealing with a live connection in SAP SAC, which means we can't handle data security at the row level.

For instance, granting access to data from specific countries for a team isn't possible.

We're considering using bookmarks to address this issue. Our goal is to share only the bookmarked view with users while keeping the original story inaccessible. For example, Team 1 should only see a bookmark filtered by USA without access to the complete story.

If directly controlling access to the original story isn't doable, we're exploring alternative options within SAP SAC to achieve this without backend modifications.

kind regards,

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud : How to get the Model size in MB/GB in SAC?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In the support link mentioned below , they have mentioned that we need to create the story on top of MEMORY_CONSUMPTION_BASE_1 model.

But I am not able to create a story on top of this model. I am already having BI ADMIN role for my ID.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3426761 

Do we have any Analytical App already to check the model size?

In the older version of SAC , the sizing of the models will be explicitly mentioned in the monitor tab.

SAC Experts please help on this!!

@thomas_fery @DebjitSingha

entry.title: How to connect Snapengage with SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to get Snapengage chats data into SAC for reporting purposes. Is there a way to connect Snapengage with SAC via connection ?

Please let me know if you've already done this in your organisation.

TIA,

Poornima.

entry.title: Ceate the data lineage of SAC.
entry.content:
We implemented Informatica as a data governance application in our company.

We will create data catalog and data lineage on Informatica. For this, we are trying to integrate Informatica with other applications within the company. One of these applications is SAC.

To create the data lineage of SAC, we are trying to get the Folder > Story (Dashboard) > Model > Query structure.

We are looking for answers to the questions of which dashboards are under which folder, which models were used in which dashboard, which live BW query was used in which model, or is the model live (import, dataset, etc.).

Can we use SAC's Rest API for this or is there a query/model that will extract this structure in csv format? If both are possible, we request your guidance on how we can obtain the output for both methods?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need to show currency in Classic Story of Chart
entry.content: I have new model type and I have defined currency for 2 Kfs as USD. I need to show the same in classic story on top of the new model. Any thoughts how to display it in parallel with kf like $100

entry.title: Consume Calculation View in SAC from CAP project not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) project in my BTP environment (trial), and I am trying to consume a calculated view from SAP Analytics Cloud (trial), I have created a connection and then when I try to select a data source in the modeler, the list is empty.

To create the CAP project I followed the following tutorials:

Create an SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Project for SAP HANA Cloud
https://youtu.be/8obCwGEx1-Q?si=ll6fWgvEqPluQa8i
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-project.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 2 - Create Database Artifacts Using Core Data Services (CDS)
https://youtu.be/uS_vT-gHYMo?si=C4W1q7I6CLfHErHP
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-database-cds.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 3 - Create a User Interface
https://youtu.be/6WY70LyLS1c?si=X0XuCNEtDW2o6sRe
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 4 - Add User Authentication
https://youtu.be/anvKQP8yOr4?si=rDy5ndYbe__6ZwHp
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-add-authentication.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 5 - Create Calculation View and Expose via CAP
https://youtu.be/zKsx91qicwU?si=xC4rZUGZrGFI7mxE
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-calc-view.html

Everything works fine, at the end of part 5 I verified that the view was created correctly (see images 1) and the service exposes the data correctly. After that I tried to consume the calculated view from SAC, following the tutorial Develop Calculation View in BAS and consume in SAC (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/develop-calculation-view-in-bas-and-consume-in-sac/ba-p/13509188), starting from step 8. I created a connection, and then I tried to create a model but when I select the data source, it doesn't show anything (see image 2).


image 1

image 2

What can I be doing wrong?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Scope Deployment
entry.content:
How to create a connection from S/4HANA to SAC?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAC Planning Advanced Formula - Rolling 3 Months Summation
entry.content:
Hi All - I am wanting to create a data action that will calculate the rolling 3 months summation value.

In other words, a user will enter a date/month range, and then for each month of that range, a rolling 3 months value must be calculated (as per pic below).

I have successfully created formula measures (using the SMA function) and added to a story, but I am now needing to calculate and store the value in the model.  And unfortunately formula measures can't be referenced in the advanced formula.

I have tried using the FOREACH and PREVIOUS functions but am not getting the result right.

Can someone please assist with the required code?

Rgds

Anton

entry.title: Can we achieve two scrollbars in an SAC table one for dimension and another for measures in freeze
entry.content:
Can we achieve two scrollbars in an SAC table one for dimension and another for measures when we use freeze in table column. This option is available in Lumira Dashboards but couldn't find in SAC table.

Attached the screenshot of Lumira dashboard table for reference (Two scrollbars are marked).

Any help in this topic is appreciated.

entry.title: SAC Mobile Cannot Find Model Information Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We have prepared a special version for mobile so that our users can view an existing report on mobile. The data source for some of these reports comes from Datasphere, while the model for another is Import Model.
Import Model reports open smoothly on mobile. However, reports running with Datasphere sometimes say "Model information cannot be found." It gets an error like this and users cannot view the report.
We thought that the problem was related to authorization, but the same problem is experienced by the user with Admin privilege. My own device is Android and it may ask for a certificate when connected to Datasphere while opening a report. I do not encounter any problems when I proceed without selecting a certificate. Other users trying to access the report have iOS devices. I think the operating system difference may also cause the problem.
I would appreciate it if you could help me with a solution to this situation.

entry.title: How to Rank by measure so it only ranking the leaves measures
entry.content:
I want to rank on "This Year Account Base Growth"  but in the table below as shown it is ranking all members where I only want it to rank the leaves 

@N1kh1l 

 

Thanks 

Peers

entry.title: SAC Analytic Application: Table calculation
entry.content:
Hi Team Members,

I am working on SAC analytic application and facing some roadblocks to achieve some results related to Tabel widget.

Need some help/Guidance to achieve the output as marked in Red box in the image below

Model Type: Datasphere Analytic Model based on Live Hana Connection

( Remote table -> Fact View -> Analytical Model -> Analytic Application)

Dimensions involved: Week , Plant No.

Measures Involved: Qty A, Qty B

Required calcultions: 1.Total , 2.Weekly Difference and  3.Other Calculation

Calculation Definitions:

1.Total: It is the sum total of Qty A for all plants 1 to 6 for each week. Although this result is achieved by selecting option Show totals on Plant No dimension but i want it to be calculated it explicitly.

2.Weekly Difference :  As marked in the red box, it is the difference between week (i )- Week ( i-1) total, 

The thing here to be noted here is that Although we do not need Week 1 total in our final display, but it would be used to calculate the value of Cell B11.(i.e., Week 2 Weekly Difference)

3.Other Calcultion: In this calculation we would need two measure Qty A and Qty B , where we are not displaying Qty B anywhere in the story, but we need that in the calculation (see attached image).

The calculation is to be only calculated for the most recent Week(here Week 4) 

Please help me to achieve these results .

Thanks in advance.

Regards,
Krishn Kant

entry.title: Importing View/Tables from Datasphere to SAC And create a Model in SAC
entry.content: can we import the Datasphere View / tables to SAC and create a model in SAC with live connection? if yes, can we export daily delta datasets to the file server in a flat file format (CSV or XLS format)?

entry.title: Disabling widget full-screen mode when clicking on the widget in SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working on a mobile story in SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD and I would like to know if it is possible to disable a widget to go in full-screen mode when clicking on it.

I created a table with a script for the "onSelect" event. I would like to execute the script when clicking on a value. But right now, after clicking a value, the table goes fullscreen, then i have to click again the value and then closing the fullscreen mode.

Is there a way to disable the full-screen mode for a widget on mobile app ?

 

Thanks for helping me

entry.title: SAC Model defined threshold with bw live query models, how?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Is it possible to create Model defined Threshold that could be applied to multiple measures within that Model?

Optimized Story Experience + BW Live Query Model (Planning)

Many thanks!

Attila

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

entry.title: Need to reduce the gap between bars of Bar chart in Story
entry.content: I have story of type classic , wanted to reduce the gap between each bar. Is there anyway its possible in old story or classic designed story? or bar should be side by side with no gap..Any tweeks if directly not possible
